arg.name: controllers_file
arg.doc: YAML file with the controllers configuration. Only LBR IIWA 14 has 7 dofs.

arg.name: initial_positions_file
arg.doc: YAML file with the initial positions when using mock hardware from ros2_control. Robots using '_all_zeros' file are: - kr210l150 -

arg.name: description_package
arg.doc: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files.

arg.name: description_macro_file
arg.doc: URDF/XACRO description file with of the robot or application. The expected location of the file is '<description_package>/urdf/'.

arg.name: use_eki_communication
arg.doc: Use EKI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C). If the flag is set to true 'eki_robot_ip' and 'eki_robot_port' arguments define the endpoint of robot controller to connect.

arg.name: eki_robot_ip
arg.doc: IP address for the robot controller for communication using EKI protocol.

arg.name: eki_robot_port
arg.doc: Port by which the robot can be reached for communication using EKI protocol.

arg.name: use_rsi_communication
arg.doc: Use RSI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C). If the flag is set to true 'rsi_listen_ip' and 'rsi_robot_port' arguments define the endpoint where robot controller should connect to. (Keep in mind that you have to define this endpoint also in the RSI configuration of the program.)

arg.name: rsi_listen_ip
arg.doc: IP address of a computer where robot controller should connect for communication using RSI protocol.

arg.name: rsi_listen_port
arg.doc: Port on a computer where robot controller should connect for communication using RSI protocol.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.doc: Start robot with fake hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: log_level_driver
arg.doc: Set the logging level of the loggers of all started nodes.

arg.name: log_level_all
arg.doc: Set the logging level of the loggers of all started nodes.
